name: 莉莉娜的奇幻之旅
short_description: Lina was judged a witch by the church, and Lilina was ordered to execute her best friend... After a few years, theia territory again appeared the trace of the devil, Lilina decided to seek the truth in those days, set foot on the journey.
detailed_description:
LATEST RELEASE


UPCOMING GAMES



About the Game

Game Introduction


Lilina was a punishment knight of the church. A few years ago, her close friend Lina was judged by the church as a witch, and lilina was appointed to kill.

Lilina has since questioned the church's mandate. A few years later, the devil comeback, Lilina by giving orders to find the opportunity of the devil, to explore the truth of the devil.

Game elements


Classic RPG template

Explore the Magic world

Multiple outcomes

Players can influence the course of the game by making different choices

Can collect more than one teammate, and have rich interactive options
